name: piper
description: Install Piper, a local text-to-speech service for OpenEnsemble voice devices. ~80 MB total install (libritts_r multi-speaker ONNX model + Python venv + piper-tts/flask). 904 speaker voices selectable by numeric ID, no API key. Lives at 127.0.0.1:5151 as a systemd --user service. Same installer is reachable from install.sh and Settings → Providers → Text-to-Speech; oe-admin runs it via this recipe. Re-running is safe — existing venv/model/service are detected and skipped.
